description: Documentation Polish and Project Completion - Update README.md with comprehensive project overview, deployment/testing instructions, and usage guide. Finalize ARCHITECTURE.md with accurate up-to-date Mermaid diagram. Create SUMMARY.md capturing key decisions and experiment notes. Update AGENT_GUIDELINES.md to reflect final state. Perform code clean-up and consistency improvements.
steps: Update README.md with: clear project overview of the Sleep Audio Pipeline, expanded architecture summary with inline Mermaid diagram, complete deployment instructions (prerequisites, setup, deploy, test), usage instructions (how to upload audio, check status, view notifications), environment configuration guide (dev/staging/prod), troubleshooting section, and links to detailed docs

Finalize docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: ensure the Current Implementation Status section accurately reflects ALL implemented components (including CloudWatch Alarms, Dashboard, X-Ray tracing on Lambda, file size validation, retry policies), update the Mermaid diagrams to show the CloudWatch Alarms -> SNS Failed Topic flow, and remove or update the 'Next Steps' section to reflect what was actually built vs what remains future work

Create docs/SUMMARY.md with: project overview, key architectural decisions (why Step Functions, why event-driven, why DynamoDB on-demand, why Python Lambda with C# CDK), what was built (complete component list), TDD methodology summary, known limitations, and notes useful for the final experiment report

Update docs/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md to reflect the final project state: add the Lambda testing pattern (Python unittest), mention the end-to-end validation test approach, update the file organization table to include Lambda code and Python tests, add any final notes about the CI workflow

Perform code clean-up: review CdkBaseStack.cs for any TODO comments or inconsistencies, ensure all code comments are accurate and up-to-date, verify the Lambda handler index.py has proper docstrings and consistent formatting, ensure cdk.json context values are complete
Verify the CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) is complete and reliable: ensure it covers dotnet restore, build, test, and cdk synth for all environments
acceptance_criteria: README.md contains comprehensive project overview, deployment instructions, usage guide, and troubleshooting
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md has accurate Mermaid diagrams reflecting all implemented components including alarms and dashboard
docs/SUMMARY.md exists with key decisions, what was built, and experiment notes
docs/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md reflects the final project state including Lambda testing patterns
All existing tests still pass after documentation and code clean-up changes
npx cdk synth succeeds for all environments (default, dev, prod)
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth -c environment=dev
unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth -c environment=prod
findings: All documentation updates completed. README.md rewritten with full project overview, deployment/usage instructions, troubleshooting. ARCHITECTURE.md updated with CloudWatch Alarms/Dashboard/X-Ray/retry policies in implementation status and updated Mermaid diagram. SUMMARY.md created with key decisions and experiment notes. AGENT_GUIDELINES.md updated with Lambda testing pattern, end-to-end validation approach, file organization. No code changes needed - CdkBaseStack.cs has no TODOs, Lambda has proper docstrings, cdk.json is complete, CI workflow covers all environments. All 129 C# tests pass (run by filter due to JSII resource issue). CDK synth succeeds for default/dev/prod.
